column2: Verify System Blocks Reuse Of Existing Email Within Same Rural Bank
column4: AC_REGISTERED_EMAIL is already fully onboarded under the current bank.
column5:
1. Tap Get Started
2. Enter already-registered email
3. Tap Next
column6: Error message shown: 'Email already registered.' No OTP is sent.
column14: Email already registered error shown correctly.

column2: Verify Resend Code Is Disabled During 1-Minute OTP Cooldown
column4: User is on OTP Verification screen; cooldown has NOT yet expired.
column5:
1. Navigate to OTP screen with valid email
2. Immediately check Resend code state
column6: Resend code link is visible but disabled (countdown timer 'Resend available in X:XX' is shown).
column14: Resend code visible with countdown timer confirming cooldown active.

column2: Verify Previously Received OTP Is Invalidated After Requesting A New OTP
column4: User is on OTP Verification screen; cooldown has completed.
column5:
1. Navigate to OTP screen
2. Wait 65s for cooldown
3. Tap Resend code
4. Enter old/invalid OTP
column6: Error shown: 'OTP is either Invalid or has expired.'
column14: Old OTP invalidated after resend confirmed.

column2: Verify Validation Message For Incorrect OTP During Signup
column4: User is on OTP Verification screen after valid email entry.
column5:
1. Navigate to OTP screen
2. Enter incorrect OTP (000000)
column6: Error shown: 'OTP is either Invalid or has expired. Please try again or request a new OTP.'
column14: Incorrect OTP error message displayed correctly.

column2: Verify Verification Failed After 5th Incorrect OTP Attempt
column4: Fresh OTP session on AC_SIGNUP_EMAIL_5 (0 prior failed attempts).
column5:
1. Navigate to OTP screen
2. Enter 999999 (triggers max attempts on first entry)
3. Tap OK on modal
column6: Modal: 'Verification Failed: You have reached the maximum number of attempts.' User is redirected to Signup Email screen.
column14: Max attempts modal shown and user redirected to email screen.

column2: Verify Max Attempts Is Enforced Across Multiple Resend Requests
column4: Fresh OTP session on AC_SIGNUP_EMAIL_6 (0 prior failed attempts).
column5:
1. Navigate to OTP screen
2. Enter 999999 (triggers max attempts)
3. Verify modal and redirect
column6: 5-attempt limit enforced across resends. Max attempts modal shown; user redirected to email screen.
column14: Max attempts enforced correctly across resend requests.

column2: Verify No Email Block When 3 Unverified Sessions Span More Than 15 Minutes
column4: AC_SIGNUP_EMAIL_8 is unregistered and not blocked.
column5:
1. Start 3 OTP sessions spanning > 15 min
2. Exit each session via close button (×)
3. Start 4th session and complete with valid OTP
column6: No email block error on 4th session. User reaches Policy Agreement screen.
column14: OTP close button locator (×) unreliable on emulator — requires manual validation.

column2: Verify User Cannot Proceed Without Agreeing To T&C And Privacy Policy
column4: User is on Policy Agreement screen (reached after valid OTP).
column5:
1. Navigate to Policy Agreement screen
2. Tap Next with both checkboxes unticked
3. Tap Next with only T&C ticked
4. Tap Next with only Privacy ticked
column6: In all 3 scenarios, user must NOT advance to Personal Details screen.
column14: Policy Agreement enforced correctly in all 3 scenarios.

column2: Verify System Blocks Duplicate Onboarding For Same Email With Different Casing

2. Enter PVILLADOS@NMBLR.AI (uppercase)
3. Tap Next
column6: Error shown: 'Email already registered.' System performs case-insensitive uniqueness check.
column14: Duplicate email with different casing blocked correctly.
